subject: Computer Networking
title: ICMP: Ping and Diagnostics
description: Learn ICMP: Ping and Diagnostics in one minute.

hook.text: You type 'ping google.com' and get a reply time. The protocol making that possible is ICMP.

buildup.text: ICMP carries error messages and operational info. It doesn't transport user data — it reports problems.

discovery.text: Ping sends an ICMP echo request. If the host is alive, it sends an echo reply. Simple and effective.

twist.text: Traceroute also uses ICMP. It maps every router hop between you and a destination by timing responses.

climax.text: Many firewalls block ICMP. That's why some hosts don't respond to ping even when they're online.

punchline.text: ICMP is the internet's error messenger.

quiz.question: What tool uses ICMP echo requests to test connectivity?
